feed.title: SAP Community - API Management
feed.subtitle: API Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP OData Service URL Construction
entry.content:
Hi,

I have established a connection to the SAP desktop GUI using the application server, instance number, and routing string. However, when I try to access the OData service using the same server IP, I encounter a timeout error. Could anyone please guide me on how to construct the URL to access the OData service using the application server, instance number, and port number?

entry.title: /IWBEP/CM_V4H_RUN/042 - "CSRF_Token_Missing" for OData V4 POST Call
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to make the OData V4 post call to assign the warehouse order as mentioned in this help document.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/5aadd5aa0ed541e49b1e006d7e17919b/202d3898930c4ab6a15de77eb4b06422.html

I have fetched the X-CSRF-Token and Etag value from the Get call as shown below.

Based on this CSRF Token and Etag values, I am making POST call and it says "CSRF-Token is Invalid "as shown below.

Are there any steps missing? Please Suggest.

entry.title: Inbound and outbound service for Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings!!

We are working on SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition. An integration between POKA and SAP is necessary for us.

We have been using the "Maintenance Notification" Inbound API lately to prove the payload from POKA and create the notification on SAP. The notification has been successfully created in SAP.

1. By returning the notification number to POKA, we must receive an acknowledgement of the notification that was made on SAP. Hope it will be a outbound service (We are not sure).

2. In addition, whenever there is a change in the notification status, it must also be reflected on the POKA.

Would you kindly recommend

Is it possible to utilize the same "Maintenance Notification" API for acknowledgment?and the status changes to be sent back to POKA ?

Could you please suggest us a Outbound API for this purpose. 

Is it possible to utilize the same API for Inbound and outbound services?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management SAP Process Integration 

Regards,

Yaswanth.

entry.title: SAP CPI API Management Policy: BasicAuthentication issue - user/password not used/populated
entry.content:
Dear Community,

In SAP CPI I have created a simple API Provider OnPremise connecting to my SAP Backend system. 

I have created an API Proxy for that Provider. 

In the Policies I would like to retrieve the User/Password for the SAP Backend and use it for Basic Authentication. 

In the TargetEndpoint PreFlow I have created Key Value Map Operation to retrieve encoded values of user/password.

In the BasicAuthentication I have assigned the user/password to the Authorization. 

Still, when I execute my Proxy API URL, it asks me for the User/Password.

Do you have any clues, what might be wrong?

<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="MyKeyValueMap" async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <Get assignTo="private.myusername" index="1">
       <Key>
          <Parameter>username</Parameter>
       </Key>
    </Get>
    <Get assignTo="private.mypassword" index="1">
       <Key>
              <Parameter>password</Parameter>
       </Key>
    </Get>
	<!-- the scope of the key value map. Valid values are environment, organization, apiproxy and policy -->
	<Scope>environment</Scope>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

 

<BasicAuthentication async='true' continueOnError='false' enabled='true' xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
 	<!-- Operation can be Encode or Decode -->
	<Operation>Encode</Operation>
	<IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>false</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
 	<!-- for Encode, User element can be used to dynamically populate the user value -->
	<User ref='private.myusername'></User>
 	<!-- for Encode, Password element can be used to dynamically populate the password value -->
	<Password ref='private.mypassword'></Password>
 	<!-- Assign to is used to assign the encoded value of username and password to a variable. This should not be used if the operation is Decode -->
	<AssignTo createNew="false">request.header.Authorization</AssignTo>
</BasicAuthentication>

 

thank you & kind regards | Simon

entry.title: how to build a RAP application to upload program in S/4 hana cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I need to develop a RAP application in the S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition to facilitate Excel uploads.

1. Is there a standard class or process available for uploading Excel files in RAP?
2. Since BAPIs cannot be called, is it possible to use the API `api_purchaseorder_2` within our own system to create purchase orders from Excel? Creating purchase orders is just one example; we have multiple requirements for uploads that are not covered by standard migration objects.

Best regards,
Shankar G

entry.title: SAP API Hub- Add new environment
entry.content:
I am following the tutorial to create SAP Build Automation, however I am stuck at the point to create new environment in the API Hub as mentioned in below link

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-run-process-api-trigger.html

I entered all the fields namely:  Display Name, Starting URL, Client ID and Secret, Authentication Domain, Consumer subdomain. But still it shows a pop up that a mandatory field is missing.

Can some one please help.

entry.title: Message Validation Policy of API Management is not validating the payload
entry.content:
Good Day Reader,

I am facing issue while trying to validate SOAP Payload which internally calling a SOAP API (which makes a RFC call).

On proxy endpoint I am trying to apply a Message Validation Policy. But policy is not getting validated somehow and passing invalid payload to SOAP API (target endpoint). 

Message Validation

<MessageValidation async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
<Element namespace="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">ZSD_ESALES_TRUCKS_LIST</Element>
<Source>request</Source>
<ResourceURL>wsdl://ZSD_ESALES_TRUCKS_LIST.wsdl</ResourceURL>
</MessageValidation>

entry.title: does SAP to SF Costcenter connector supports workflow triggers on costcenter creation / inactivation
entry.content:
we have setup an integration from SAP ERP to SuccessFactors to replicate costcenters.

it's similar to : 

Configuring the replication of Cost Centers from S... - SAP Community

we have identified an issue regarding SuccessFactors workflows not being triggered.

we have tried to use the api parameter : 

workflowConfirmed=true

but these tip didn't fix the issue.

we are suspecting that workflow can't be triggered for some standard entities, while working for others.

who could confirm these ? 

are we facing a limitation or can we have workflow successfully running when a costcenter is created on specific countries.

we have payroll process relying on these information to update new referential data on third party payroll system.

entry.title: Securing CPI iFlows with API Proxy using SAP APIM
entry.content:
Good day reader, 

I am working on the project where we are migrating PI PO integrations to SAP BTP Cloud Integrations. We have many SOAP based integrations, these integrations are used by our third party vendors. I plan to develop these SOAP integrations in below manner, I need expert advice on it.

Steps followed.

1. First, I made a generic SOAP API (CPI) that takes as soap request and send to RFC Adapter for processing.

2. Next, I am creating proxy in API Management (SAP) to call the above created SOAP API to process the request. Here I would apply authentication (OAuth2), validation of payload  (Message Validation), Injection Policies and so on to create a secure layer. 

3. Third, create a product project wise and added APIs according to the project.  

4. Last, share the credentials by creating Applications of each product with the developer team.

entry.title: Challenge with SAP Event Mesh: Status Code 200 in Postman and ABAP, but 503 in Event Mesh
entry.content:
Problem Statement:

In our current architecture, we use SAP Event Mesh to transmit messages to SAP IS-U (R3). The process involves an SAP Event Mesh webhook calling a SICF service under the path /sap/event_mesh_api/ via the URL /sap/event_mesh_api/events?sap-client=XXX within our IS-U environment. However, in tests with Postman and an ABAP report, we get different results: 

Test with Postman and ABAP Report: 

When testing the target URL /sap/event_mesh_api/events?sap-client=XXX using Postman or an ABAP report, we receive an HTTP status code 200, indicating a successful connection and response. 

 

Test with SAP Event Mesh Webhook: 

However, when the Event Mesh webhook calls the same URL, an HTTP status code 503 is logged in Event Mesh. This suggests that the target URL is either unreachable or there is a failure in server-side processing. 

 

Monitoring and Troubleshooting: 

No messages are displayed in Cloud Connector Monitoring. This could mean that the message either never reaches the Cloud Connector or that an error in processing prevents the message from being correctly logged. 

 

Internal Test Service: 

To further test the functionality of Event Mesh, we connected an internal test service. When triggering the service through the webhook, we observed that the messages were successfully delivered via Event Mesh to the service. This confirms that the basic configuration of Event Mesh is working. 

 

Issue with the Cloud Connector: 

However, a problem arises when the Cloud Connector is involved in the communication. The messages that are supposed to be sent via the Event Mesh webhook to the IS-U environment do not reach the Cloud Connector. We suspect that the issue lies within the Cloud Connector configuration, but we have not yet identified the exact cause. 

 

Contact with SAP Support: 

SAP Support was unable to reproduce the problem in their environment; the connection worked flawlessly on their side. 

Question to the Community: We are facing the challenge that the Event Mesh webhook does not provide the same response as the tests in Postman or ABAP. Instead, it returns a status code 503, indicating a service failure. 

Has anyone in the community experienced similar issues with SAP Event Mesh? If so, what steps or solutions were helpful in troubleshooting? 

Some specific questions where we need assistance: 

Different Status Codes: Why might the Event Mesh webhook return a status code 503, while direct tests with Postman or ABAP return a status code 200? 

 

Monitoring Issue: Why do the messages not appear in Cloud Connector Monitoring? Are there specific settings or logs that could provide more insight into the cause of the problem? 

 

Cloud Connector Issue: Has anyone experienced similar issues related to Cloud Connector configuration? What specific points should we check? 

 

Additional Tests or Configurations: What other tests or configuration changes could be helpful in identifying the root cause of the problem? 

We look forward to your experiences, tips, and solutions to help resolve this issue. 

Thank you in advance for your support! 

Attachment: Following this post, you will find screenshots documenting the issues described, configuration and our previous tests. 

 

 

 

 

 

 


#SAPEventMesh #SAPBTP #CloudConnector #SAPIntegration #ISU #ABAP #SAPTechWebhooks #SAPSupport #SAPArchitectur

entry.title: Using Basic Authentication in SAP API Proxy Preflow
entry.content:
Dear All,

I want to do basic authentication while calling from external application to APIM. I have the API proxy added to Product and then Application also in API Business Hub Enterprise. I got the Application secret and key. Can I share them with the external calling application so that they can use it to authenticate? I tried through postman but getting 401 error.

entry.title: How to create a Key Value Map with scope Organization, APIProxy
entry.content:
Dear All,

I couldn't find any help on how to create a KVM with the scope organization or apiproxy. The default is written as environment. The UI is also not giving any option.

entry.title: Add payment terms description (TEXT1) from T052U table in the response of API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
entry.content:
Hi Everyne,

I am working on a special requirement that needs  the Payment term description into the response of standard API_BUSINESS_PARTNER. Currently it provides only payment term. I understand the description of payment term is available in standard table T052U - TEXT1.  But to bring description is it possible to add the field in the standard API and write custom logic to fill the data into the field?

 

Thank you in advance

Sivaprasad

entry.title: Error APIMGT100: Activation of API Management capability has failed
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

I am getting error while activating API Management Capability in Integration Suit of Trail account . 

"Error APIMGT100: Activation of API Management capability has failed".
 
Deleted Integration Suit subscription and created again but same error is popping up .. other capabilities are getting added .
 
pls advise . 
 
API Management

entry.title: 404 undocumented error in Integration Suite Learning Journey in GW SAMPLE
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am recentlyexperiencing a 404 Undocumented error in the learning journey : https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-with-sap-integration-suite 

The error occurs while we try to test the GET response to the API created from the GWSAMPLE BASIC .

Can anyone please help me out in this case. I am also attaching the SS of the same.

SAP Integration Suite API Management

entry.title: Reading of IP Address and check if it is whitelisted in the key value mapping in SAP APIM
entry.content:
Dear Team,
I have a requirement where i need to check the IP address is whitelisted or not using KeyValueMapping in SAP APIM.
My customer will trigger the request from their application. In my case i am using the postman. As a part of header i am able to see the IP Address which is getting stored in the header X-Forwarded for. Now i need to check if the IP Address is present in the key value map if it exists then i need to proceed with the next steps. Other wise it should throw the error as invalid IP. I have defined the value mapping as well with list of ip addresses. If I am using the parameter from postman then it is checking the key and accordingly it is giving the results. But my customer will not pass any parameter. So i need to store the IP address and check in the key value maps dynamically. Please help me on this with steps. 

Regards
Santosh

entry.title: How to use Content-ID to reference the ETag in an OData Batch Request?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm trying to send a batch request following the OData V4 Guideline: https://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_ReferencinganETag

My request body and the response is:

In my batch request, I tried to read an entity with Content-ID:1 and use this Content-ID as the referenced Etag in the If-Match part for the PATCH request. The response said my second request's syntax is wrong.

entry.title: Custom APIs/Modifying standard Apis
entry.content:
I have a requirement which I have to call SAP API from an external agent via POST only. I have identified a similar SAC Api, /v1/scim/User/{id} , which has similar functionality but does not fulfil the requirement. For the API call requirement, it should be something like the following.

POST /getUser/{id} - > Get user details based on id
POST /deleteUser/{id} - > Delete user based on id
POST /updateUser/{id} -> Update user based on id

Is this achievable in SAC or is there a custom workaround to it.

Thank you

entry.title: API for display CK13N result
entry.content:
Hello, Experts,

Is there any API can be used to read costing run data like CK13N ?

 

RGDS Joanna Qiu

entry.title: How to get UUID of WBS element using API in s4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to create Project Demand (Resources) using external Web Service API.

The API I used is this one.

And in this API, one of the mandatory field WBS element is needed to enter as UUID value (ReferencedObjectUUID).

So, to able to retrieve UUID of WBS element, we will need to use WBS element API and WBS element APIs are depracted.

So, I used Enterprise Project API instead and able to retrieve WBS element UUID of Project Element ID by using /A_EnterpriseProjectElement entity with get method.

 

But the problem here is that the API can retrieve only UUID of Project Element IDs as WBS element UUID.

*Green highlighted one is Parent Project ID and yellow highlighted are Project Element IDs.

And when I want to choose Parent Project ID (Test260801) as WBS element, the API can only show Parent Project UUID and cannot retrieve UUID of that Parent Project ID as WBS element UUID.

And when I enter the Parent Project UUID in ReferencedObjectUUID field, "WBS element does not exist" error occurs.

Parent Project UUID

Error

So, I would like to know that how can I retrieve UUID of Parent Project ID as WBS element UUID using API (or) is there any workaround that is possible to do so?

If you have any experience (or) idea about this case, could you please kindly answer for me.

 

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan
